title: Model catalog + provider routing (incl. Digital Ocean)
summary: Add a curated catalog of Kimi/GLM/DeepSeek/Gemma/Qwen/Gemini/GPT models (each with provider + wire id) and a router that builds a Pydantic AI model per entry — Gemini→Google, GPT→OpenAI, the rest→Digital Ocean's OpenAI-compatible endpoint; adds DO config/env. No runtime change, fully unit-tested.

title: Persistence: DB model, migration, web API, bot service
summary: Add the channel_model_overrides table (legacy schema) + Alembic migration, GET/PUT/DELETE web API endpoints (validating model_key against the catalog and budgets >= 0), and a bot-side ModelOverrideService wired into bot.d. Data layer works end to end; unused by UI/runtime yet.

title: Admin slash command + model-selection modal
summary: Add the admin-gated /setmodel command that opens a modal to pick a model for the current channel and set daily+hourly token budgets (0 = unlimited), persisting via the stage-02 service; registers the modal custom_id in the events.py dispatch. Includes a select-in-modal vs two-step fallback decision.

title: Apply the override + enforce token budgets in the chat runtime
summary: Make chat_engine use the override model (per-model agent cache) and enforce daily/hourly token budgets via Redis fixed-window counters (0 = unlimited), incrementing usage after each turn; channels without an override are unchanged. Completes the feature.
